name: proxmox-mcp-suite
description: Token-efficient Proxmox VE + Proxmox Backup Server MCP servers for Claude Code — deep infrastructure control with safety-gated mutations, dry-run previews, and a tamper-evident audit log.

plugins.name: proxmox-ve
plugins.description: Proxmox VE MCP server — 52 action-based tools: guest lifecycle (create/clone/power/resize), snapshots, backups, storage, disks/LVM/ZFS, guest/host/LXC exec, task forensics. Token-efficient output, confirm + data-loss gates, dry-run previews, hash-chained audit.

plugins.name: proxmox-backup
plugins.description: Proxmox Backup Server (PBS) MCP server — datastores, snapshots, garbage collection, verify, and prune, read-only by default with an explicit write toggle.
